name: Chilled Couscous Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 large Tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place couscous in a large bowl.
2. Pour 1 cup boiling water over the couscous and let stand.
3. In a saucepan, bring vegetable stock to a boil. Add thyme and vinegar. Reduce to 3/4 cups.
4. Add peas and corn to the liquid and turn off heat.
5. Toss tomatoes, scallions, and basil into the couscous.
6. Add the liquid to the couscous and mix well.
7. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
8. To serve, place a romaine leaf in a dish and top with the couscous mixture.
Makes 6 servings (Per serving: 197 calories, 2 grams fat) from Beyond Alfalfa Sprouts and Cheese...
